channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: California couple found dead after sending money to Tom Selleck impostor
item.description: Donald and Karen Whitaker were found with traumatic injuries inside their home on May 15, according to the Riverside County Sheriff's Department.

item.title: Artificial intelligence could eliminate thousands of jobs in New York City: Report
item.description: AI promises a "radical transformation" of the world's financial capital, New York City Comptroller Mark Levin said.

item.title: Congress delays reconciliation votes as GOP opposes new DOJ fund
item.description: The House and Senate will leave for recess without voting on a reconciliation package for federal immigration funding.

item.title: DNC releases long-awaited autopsy on 2024 election
item.description: The Democratic National Committee released an autopsy on the 2024 election that chair Ken Martin had kept under wraps for months.
